:::config { "language": "php", "theme": "min-dark" }
'a';
'b'; // +1 [tl! reindex(+1)]
'c';
'd'; // -3 [tl! reindex(-3)]
// Have a little break... [tl! reindex(null)]
'e';
'f';
'g';
// Yada yada... [tl! reindex(null)]
'x'; // 24 [tl! reindex(24)]
'y';
'z';
:::expectation
<pre><code data-theme='min-dark' data-lang='php' class='phiki language-php min-dark torchlight' style='background-color: #1f1f1f;--theme-selection-background: #212121'><!-- Syntax highlighted by Phiki and torchlight.dev --><div class='line'><span style="color: #727272; text-align: right; -webkit-user-select: none; user-select: none;" class="line-number"> 1</span><span class="token" style="color: #ffab70;">&#039;a&#039;</span><span class="token" style="color: #b392f0;">;
